3322960.name: Pioneers of Pagonia - Official Guide
3322960.description:
"Pioneers of Pagonia – Official Guide" is your essential companion to the epic city-building and strategy game Pioneers of Pagonia. Across 234 pages, this comprehensive handbook provides detailed instructions, helpful tips, and smart strategies to help you build, grow, and defend your settlement.

Whether you're playing the campaign, a scenario, or a procedurally generated map, this guide reveals the secrets of every region, teaches you how to master resource management, and shows you how to forge alliances or defeat your enemies.

With step-by-step walkthroughs, detailed illustrations, and strategic advice, this guidebook is the key to success in the world of Pagonia — perfect for both newcomers and experienced players alike.

Inside the Guide:
  • Basics: Learn the core mechanics, objectives, and how each map is structured.
  • Menus & Interface: A clear overview of all menus and how to use them efficiently.
  • Your First Buildings: Step-by-step instructions for constructing essential buildings and setting up your settlement.
  • The World of Pagonia: Discover the different regions, their unique features, and the resources they offer.
  • Resource Management: Tips and tricks for handling wood, stone, food, and other resources efficiently.
  • Buildings & Professions: Detailed information on every building and the roles of your villagers.
  • Becoming a Leader: Strategies for expanding your territory and growing your population.
  • Friendship & Trade: How to build friendly relations with neighboring villages and benefit from trade.
  • Defeating Enemies: Learn about enemy types and the best ways to overcome them.
  • Multiplayer: Helpful advice for playing co-op with friends.
  • ... and much more!

Available in German and English. Both versions are installed automatically.

Where can I find the guide after purchase?

After installation, Steam saves the PDF in your game directory. By default, you can find it here:

C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Pioneers of Pagonia\Official Guide

If you don’t see the file, make sure the DLC is downloaded.
In your Steam Library, right-click Pioneers of Pagonia, select Properties → DLC, and ensure the Guidebook DLC is checked.
